scope: AgenC plugin.json schema and normalization contract

omissions.reason: Marketplace fetch/install source schemas, marketplace-name reservation, installed-plugin metadata, and remote registry policy belong to later plugin-kit rows. PK-02 carries the local plugin.json schema surface consumed by the current loader.

MCPB/DXT bundle path and URL declarations are intentionally rejected in PK-02 because the current AgenC plugin loader only reads local JSON MCP server maps. Bundle install/extraction belongs with later plugin runtime and marketplace rows (PK-03/PK-09).

LSP transport/settings/shutdownTimeout/restartOnCrash manifest fields are intentionally rejected in PK-02 because AgenC's current LSP config input does not carry them. Preserving those fields belongs with later plugin runtime integration.
Filesystem manifest discovery and bounded JSON reading remain in runtime/src/plugins/manifest.ts; schema validation and normalization live in runtime/src/plugins/manifest-schema.ts.

requiredBehaviors: Keep .agenc-plugin/plugin.json discovery and bounded JSON reads in manifest.ts
Keep plugin.json type validation and normalization in manifest-schema.ts
Normalize dependencies from strings and object entries
Normalize interface URL aliases and default prompts
Reject command metadata without exactly one of source or content
Reject unsafe object keys in command, settings, userConfig, channel, and server maps
Validate userConfig option keys, required fields, allowed types, defaults, and unknown fields
Validate and preserve channel declarations for later runtime integration
